title: MikroTik RouterBOARD L009UiGS-RM
description: The successor to the legendary RB2011 product line is here! The L009UiGS-RM is the perfect small desktop/rackmount solution with low acquisition cost, high performance requirement and passive cooling . The device is equipped with a powerful dual-core IPQ-5018 processor with a clock speed of 800 MHz, 512 MB RAM, 128 MB storage, 8x Gigabit LAN with support for PoE-IN (24 - 56V passive or 802.af) on the first and PoE-Out (passive only) on the last port, a full USB 3.0 port (for example, to connect… (8) Gigabit Ethernet (1) SFP port with speed up to 2.5 Gbps 800 MHz CPU - 2 cores, ARM 64bit architecture 4x more powerful compared to RB2011 2 types of power supply - DC jack, PoE (24 to 56 V DC or 802.3af) 128MB NAND, 512MB RAM RouterOS level 5, version 7 Passive cooling without fans Possibility of installation in a 19" rack Device Power adapter 24 V/1.5 A Rackmount kit K-79
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Multiple WAN Yes LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (1) 1G/2.5Gbps Serial port RJ45 USB Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 24 .. 56V DC Power type PoE, DC connector PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE-Out standards Passive 24V, Passive 48V PoE Out ports 1 PoE budget [W] 30 Max. power consumption [W] 8 Power via connector/terminal 24 .. 56V DC Physical characteristics Design Desktop, Rackmount "U" positions 1 Fans No Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 220 Height [mm] 22 Depth [mm] 125 Hardware CPU IPQ-5018 CPU frequency [MHz] 800 CPU cores 2 Internal storage [MB] 128 RAM [MB] 512
